ddls:
CREATE TABLE "films" (
  "tconst" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each film */,
  "title_type" TEXT /* Type of title (e.g., movie, series) */,
  "primary_title" TEXT /* Main title of the film */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year the film was released */,
  "genres" TEXT /* Genres associated with the film */,
  "average_rating" REAL /* Average rating from users */,
  "num_votes" INTEGER /* Total number of votes cast */,
  "weighted_average" REAL /* Weighted average rating based on a formula */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the film in minutes */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the film */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated by the film */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language of the film */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country of origin of the film */,
  "production_company" TEXT /* Production company behind the film */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tconst")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Brief description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_genres" (
  "film_id" TEXT /* ID of the film */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ratings" (
  "rating_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rating */,
  "film_id" TEXT /* ID of the film being rated */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the rating */,
  "rating_value" REAL /* Value of the rating given by the user */,
  "rating_date" TEXT /* Date when the rating was submitted */,
  "rating_source" TEXT /* Source of the rating (e.g., IMDB, Rotten Tomatoes) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rating_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_ratings_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("tconst")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., viewer, critic, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user (hashed for security) */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the user registered */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "film_id" TEXT /* ID of the film being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user providing the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text content of the review */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was submitted */,
  "review_title" TEXT /* Title of the review */,
  "review_rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user in the review */,
  "helpful_votes" INTEGER /* Number of users who found the review helpful */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("tconst")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_cast" (
  "film_id" TEXT /* ID of the film */,
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the actor */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the actor */,
  "cast_order" INTEGER /* Order of appearance in the film's credits */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "actors" (
  "actor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each actor */,
  "actor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the actor */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the actor */,
  "birth_place" TEXT /* Birthplace of the actor */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the actor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("actor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_directors" (
  "film_id" TEXT /* ID of the film */,
  "director_id" INTEGER /* ID of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("film_id", "director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "directors" (
  "director_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each director */,
  "director_name" TEXT /* Full name of the director */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the director */,
  "birth_place" TEXT /* Birthplace of the director */,
  "biography" TEXT /* Brief biography of the director */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("director_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "viewership" (
  "view_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each view event */,
  "film_id" TEXT /* ID of the film being viewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user watching the film */,
  "view_date" TEXT /* Date when the film was viewed */,
  "view_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of the view session */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("view_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewership_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("tconst"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_viewership_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "film_awards" (
  "award_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each award */,
  "film_id" TEXT /* ID of the film that won the award */,
  "award_name" TEXT /* Name of the award */,
  "award_year" INTEGER /* Year when the award was won */,
  "award_category" TEXT /* Category of the award */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("award_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_film_awards_film_id FOREIGN KEY ("film_id") REFERENCES films ("tconst")
)
